message_text: The replacement is late again and the complaint is still unresolved.
I will update you by Friday.
Friday passed with no update. We are speaking with a competitor and may cancel.
The rollout is going well. Can you show us an approved analytics option?
Order volume is lower and the package price is difficult to justify.
The current package price is too high for our lower order volume.
Please send the latest account statement.
Thank you. The issue is resolved and our next order has been placed.
Our orders are falling because the package price is difficult to justify.
